:::{#lem-deriv-invodds}
#### Derivative of odds w.r.t. log-odds

$$\derivf{\odds}{\logodds} = \odds$$

:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

::: proof

Using [the odds-from-log-odds lemma](binary-outcome-associations.qmd#lem-odds-from-logodds) and [the derivative of the exponential function](math-prereqs.qmd#thm-deriv-exp):

$$
\ba
\derivf{\odds}{\logodds} 
&= \deriv{\logodds} \exp{\logodds}
\\
&= \exp{\logodds}
\\
&= \odds
\ea
$$

:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

:::{#thm-d_odds-d_logodds}

#### Derivative of odds in terms of probability

$$\derivf{\odds}{\logodds} = \frac{\pi}{1-\pi}$${#eq-d_omega-d_eta}

:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

::: proof

Using @lem-deriv-invodds and [odds as a function of probability](binary-outcome-associations.qmd#thm-prob-to-odds):

$$
\ba
\derivf{\odds}{\logodds}
&= \odds
&& \text{(derivative of odds w.r.t. log-odds)}
\\ &= \frac{\prob}{1-\prob}
&& \text{(odds as a function of probability)}
\ea
$$

:::
